case_title: ROBIN F LEVITT VS. GINA GALLO et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEVITT, ROBIN F AS TO DEFENDANT GALLO, GINA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LEVITT, ROBIN F
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEVITT, ROBIN F SERVED OCT-14-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GALLO, GINA

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GALLO, GINA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEVITT, ROBIN F RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALLO, GINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 227 LILY STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GALLO, GINA

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF LEVITT, ROBIN F AS TO DEFENDANT GALLO, GINA DOES 1 TO 5
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT (UNLAWFUL DETAINER-CODE CIVIL PROC., 585(D)). FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEVITT, ROBIN F
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GALLO, GINA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEVITT, ROBIN F RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALLO, GINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED PREMISES ON NOVEMBER 15, 2011. $2,487.58 RENT, $590.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,078.33, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
